import React from 'react'; import { ArrowLeft, User, MapPin, Clock, FileText, Car, Users, ShieldCheck, X, XCircle, MessageCircle, ExternalLink, Smartphone } from 'lucide-react'; import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion'; const DetailSection = ({ icon: Icon, title, children }) => (

{title}

{children}
); const DetailItem = ({ label, value, subValue }) => (

{label}

{value || 'NOT DECLARED'}

{subValue &&

{subValue}

}
); const VisitorDetailView = ({ visitor, onBack, onAction }) => { const [showMembers, setShowMembers] = React.useState(false); if (!visitor) return null; return ( {/* 1. Header Navigation - Minimal & Focused */}
{/* 2. Primary Identity Section - Centered Focus */}
{visitor.name.split(' ').map(n => n[0]).join('')}

{/* 4. Logistics & Assets - Unified */}

) : (

)}

{(visitor.members?.length || 0) + 1}

Total Authorized Members

setShowMembers(true)} className="p-10 border-2 border-dashed border-white/5 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4 cursor-pointer hover:border-mas-red/50 hover:bg-mas-red/[0.02] transition-all group" >

Review All Identity Scans
{/* Full Batch Registry Overlay - Enhanced with Phone Numbers */} {showMembers && ( <> setShowMembers(false)} className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/95 backdrop-blur-md z-[200]" />

{member.nic}

{member.contact || "N/A"}

))} {(!visitor.members || visitor.members.length === 0) && (

)}
)} ); }; export default VisitorDetailView;
